Typedefs | Functions
properties.h File Reference

Typed list of property_t key-value pairs. More...

#include <stdlib.h>
#include <string.h>
#include "list.h"
#include "property.h"

Go to the source code of this file.

Typedefs

typedef list_t properties_t
 List of property_t key-value pairs.
 

Functions

static properties_t * properties_new (size_t size)
 Allocate a new properties list.
 
static void properties_free (properties_t *properties, void(*free_func)(void *))
 Free a properties list and optionally each property.
 
static bool properties_add (properties_t *properties, property_t *property)
 Append a property to the list.
 
static property_t * properties_get (const properties_t *properties, size_t index)
 Retrieve a property by index.
 
static size_t properties_size (const properties_t *properties)
 Return the current number of properties.
 
static size_t properties_capacity (const properties_t *properties)
 Return the allocated capacity.
 
static bool properties_empty (const properties_t *properties)
 Check whether the list is empty.
 
static property_t * properties_find (const properties_t *properties, const char *name)
 Find a property by name.
 
static void properties_clear (properties_t *properties, void(*free_func)(void *))
 Remove all properties from the list, optionally freeing each one.
 
static properties_t * properties_duplicate (const properties_t *original)
 Create a deep copy of a properties list.
 
static void properties_iterate (const properties_t *properties, void(*callback)(property_t *))
 Iterate over all properties and invoke a callback for each.
 
static void properties_inspect (const properties_t *properties, int(*print_func)(const char *,...), const char *indent)
 Print a human-readable dump of the properties list.
 

Detailed Description

Author
IMD Software Team
Attention

Copyright (c) 2026 STMicroelectronics. All rights reserved.

This software is licensed under terms that can be found in the LICENSE file in the root directory of this software component. If no LICENSE file comes with this software, it is provided AS-IS.

Provides properties_t (a list_t specialization) together with creation, lookup, duplication and inspection helpers.

property_t * property )
inlinestatic
Parameters
[in,out]propertiesPointer to the list.
[in]propertyPointer to the property to copy in.
Returns
true on success.

void(* free_func )(void *) )

[in,out]propertiesPointer to the list.

◆ properties_duplicate()

static properties_t * properties_duplicate ( const properties_t * original)
inlinestatic

Each property is copied by value; string pointers are shared.

Parameters
[in]originalPointer to the source properties list.
Returns
Pointer to the duplicated list, or NULL on failure.

inlinestatic
Parameters
[in]propertiesPointer to the list.
Returns
true if the list contains no items.

const char * name )
inlinestatic
Parameters
[in]propertiesPointer to the list.
[in]nameNull-terminated name to search for.
Returns
Pointer to the matching property, or NULL if not found.

[in]propertiesPointer to the list.
[in]print_funcPrintf-like callback used for output.
[in]indentPrefix string prepended to each line.
